metadata.description: Free paid media skills for Claude, by Sulka Labs.

plugins.name: sulka-labs-paid-ads-toolkit
plugins.description: Ten drop-in skills that audit and improve Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts for any brand. Finds wasted spend, grades campaigns, writes human-sounding ads, builds audiences, and stops the scroll. Works with a connected ad account or with data you paste in. No API keys, no code.
